label: Peeling bark volume
reason: Direct arboreal-resource effect. Snag and fallen template edits change bark, hollow, or senescent voxels in both the scenario and baseline.

label: Perchable canopy volume
reason: Mostly indirect. The sim path is unchanged; the canopy-support footprint shifts because the edited arboreal templates occupy different voxels.

label: Hollow count
reason: Direct arboreal-resource effect. Snag and fallen template edits change bark, hollow, or senescent voxels in both the scenario and baseline.

label: Combined ground-cover/dead branch/epiphyte indicators
reason: Mostly a deadwood-template effect. The old-snag geometry and elm-fallen swap change resource voxels, then the baseline moves with them.

label: Non-paved surface area
reason: Mostly indirect. Ground and overlap indicators move because the edited tree footprints change where arboreal voxels intersect the search masks, and the baseline denominator moves too.

label: Combined nurse-log/fallen-tree indicators
reason: Direct fallen-template effect. The new fallen geometry changes fallen-tree coverage and also shifts the baseline denominator.
